product_overview: Mobile sales-force app (offline-first) that enables field users to manage clients, products, orders, visits and payments locally with SQLite and synchronize transactions with backend services. The app exposes role-based navigation and mobile native features (camera, geolocation) via Capacitor/Cordova.
core_goals: Enable reliable offline-first sales operations using local SQLite persistence and a transaction queue.
Allow field users to manage clients, products, orders, visits and collections on-device and synchronize with backend services.
Provide a simple, role-based dashboard to surface only modules relevant to the user.
Support runtime configuration (WsUrl, API keys) without recompiling via environment loader.
Expose clear synchronization controls and status for operators to manage data consistency.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with username/password, support remember-me and offline login using local SQLite cached credentials when network is unavailable.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill login/username input field -> Fill password input field -> Toggle "remember me" checkbox -> Click Login button to submit -> See dashboard at /home
Navigate to /login -> Fill login/username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

Navigate to /login -> Fill login/username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error when network unavailable -> App uses SQLite to validate credentials offline -> If offline credentials valid see dashboard at /home -> If offline credentials invalid see error message

features.name: Home Navigation
features.description: Main dashboard after login showing role-filtered menu and access to modules (pedidos, clientes, productos, visitas, cobros, etc.).
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> See sidebar with modules filtered by user profile -> Click sidebar item 'Pedidos' -> Navigate to /pedidos
Navigate to /home -> See sidebar with modules filtered by user profile -> Click sidebar item 'Sincronización' -> Navigate to /synchronization
Navigate to /home -> Attempt to access protected route without session -> Redirect to /login -> See session expired or login required message

features.name: Orders (Pedidos)
features.description: Create, edit and list orders locally; product search and item addition occur in the order form; orders are saved locally and queued for sync.
user_flows: Navigate to /pedidos -> View orders list -> Click Create New Order -> Navigate to /pedido -> Search and select products -> Add items to order -> Fill order details (client, payment terms) -> Click Save -> See new order in /pedidosLista
Navigate to /pedidos -> Click Create New Order -> Navigate to /pedido -> Click Save without adding items -> See validation error 'Add at least one item' -> Remain on /pedido

Navigate to /pedidos -> Create new order and Click Save -> See order saved locally -> Attempt automatic sync -> See network error -> Order marked as pending in local queue and visible in /pedidosLista

features.name: Clients (Clientes)
features.description: Search, view and create clients and potential clients; client details are stored locally and can be edited on-device.
user_flows: Navigate to /clientes -> Use search input to search and view clients -> Click a client entry -> View client details
Navigate to /clientes -> Click Create Potential Client -> Fill required client fields -> Click Save -> See new potential client in clients list
Navigate to /clientes -> Click Create Potential Client -> Fill incomplete required fields -> Click Save -> See validation error for missing required fields

features.name: Products (Productos)
features.description: Browse and search the product catalog stored locally; view product list and product details.
user_flows: Navigate to /productos -> View product list at /productList -> Use search products input to filter results -> Click a product -> View product details
Navigate to /productos -> Search for a product that does not exist -> See no results message -> Option to clear search or synchronize catalog
Navigate to /productos -> Attempt to view details while master data not synced -> See 'data unavailable' or 'please synchronize' message

features.name: Synchronization
features.description: Control data synchronization with backend: download catalogs/tables and upload pending local transactions; shows progress and status.
user_flows: Navigate to /synchronization -> Click Trigger sync -> App calls GET createTables.json and sync endpoints -> See sync status 'In progress' -> See sync status 'Success' when finished
Navigate to /synchronization -> Click Trigger sync -> Network is unavailable -> See sync status 'Failed' -> See retry option and pending transactions remain queued locally
Navigate to /synchronization -> Click Trigger sync -> Backend returns partial errors -> See detailed sync report with failed tables -> Failed items remain queued for retry

features.name: Visits (Visitas)
features.description: Create and manage sales visits/dispatches including add visit details and optionally capture geolocation and attachments.
user_flows: Navigate to /visitas -> View visits list at /listaVisitas -> Click Create Visit -> Navigate to /visita -> Add visit details and attach photos -> Click Save -> See visit stored locally and listed in /listaVisitas
Navigate to /visitas -> Click Create Visit -> Navigate to /visita -> Attempt to save without required fields -> See validation error and remain on /visita
Navigate to /visitas -> Create visit and save -> GPS/geolocation unavailable -> See warning 'Geolocation unavailable' -> Save visit without coordinates and mark for later enrichment

features.name: Payments (Cobros)
features.description: View pending payments for clients and register payment transactions locally; payments are queued for sync.
user_flows: Navigate to /cobros -> View pending payments list -> Select client pending payment -> Fill payment amount and method -> Click Register payment -> See payment saved locally and marked pending for sync
Navigate to /cobros -> Select client pending payment -> Enter invalid payment amount (e.g., negative) -> Click Register payment -> See validation error and remain on payment form
Navigate to /cobros -> Register payment while offline -> See network error on sync attempt -> Payment remains stored locally and flagged for upload on next synchronization

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with username and password, supports offline mode with SQLite
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Home Navigation
user_interactions: Navigate to different sections via sidebar
Access pedidos, clientes, productos, visitas, cobros, etc

known_limitations.issue: App requires network for initial login; WsUrl loaded from window.__env
known_limitations.impact: Tests may need mocked env or backend

known_limitations.issue: Uses Capacitor and SQLite for mobile; some features may behave differently in browser
known_limitations.impact: Test in browser context may have limited coverage
